LuaScript:
-- Constants
card_scale = 1.42055011
img_host = "https://img.silvie.org/api-data/"
card_back = "https://img.silvie.org/cdn/deck-builder/card-back.png"

ui_decklist_state = {}
ui_sleeve_state = {}
ui_material_deck_sleeve_state = {}

-- Snappoints
local left_col0_x_off = 1.92
local left_col_x_off = 1.385
local left_col2_x_off = 1.05
local right_col0_x_off = -left_col0_x_off
local right_col_x_off = -left_col_x_off
local right_col2_x_off = -left_col2_x_off

local left_mid_col_x_off = 0.425
local right_mid_col_x_off = -left_mid_col_x_off

local top_row_z_off = -0.638
local middle_row_z_off = -0.07
local bottom_row_z_off = 0.58

local memory_row_z = 0.7

deck_position = {
  material = {left_col_x_off, 0, middle_row_z_off},
  main = {right_col_x_off, 0, middle_row_z_off},
  sideboard = {right_col0_x_off, 0, bottom_row_z_off}, --{left_col_x_off, 0, top_row_z_off},
  token = {0, 0, top_row_z_off},
  generated = {0, 0, middle_row_z_off},
  references = {right_col0_x_off, 0, middle_row_z_off},
  spawn = {right_col0_x_off, 0, middle_row_z_off}
}

function setMatSnapPoints(mat)
  snap_points = {
    -- Banished
    { position = {right_col_x_off,0,top_row_z_off},
      rotation = {0,90,0},
      rotation_snap = true },
    -- Main Deck Zone
    { position = deck_position["main"],
      rotation = {0,0,0},
      rotation_snap = true },
    -- Graveyard
    { position = {right_col_x_off,0,bottom_row_z_off},
      rotation = {0,0,0},
      rotation_snap = true },

    -- Memory 1
    { position = {-0.875,0,memory_row_z},
      rotation = {0,0,0},
      rotation_snap = true },
    -- Memory 2
    { position = {-0.700,0,memory_row_z},
      rotation = {0,0,0},
      rotation_snap = true },
    -- Memory 3
    { position = {-0.525,0,memory_row_z},
      rotation = {0,0,0},
      rotation_snap = true },
    -- Memory 4
    { position = {-0.350,0,memory_row_z},
      rotation = {0,0,0},
      rotation_snap = true },
    -- Memory 5
    { position = {-0.175,0,memory_row_z},
      rotation = {0,0,0},
      rotation_snap = true },
    -- Memory 6
    { position = {0.0,0,memory_row_z},
      rotation = {0,0,0},
      rotation_snap = true },
    -- Memory 7
    { position = {0.175,0,memory_row_z},
      rotation = {0,0,0},
      rotation_snap = true },
   -- Memory 8
    { position = {0.350,0,memory_row_z},
      rotation = {0,0,0},
      rotation_snap = true },
    -- Memory 9
    { position = {0.525,0,memory_row_z},
      rotation = {0,0,0},
      rotation_snap = true },
   -- Memory 10
    { position = {0.700,0,memory_row_z},
      rotation = {0,0,0},
      rotation_snap = true },
    -- Memory 11
    { position = {0.875,0,memory_row_z},
      rotation = {0,0,0},
      rotation_snap = true },
  }
  mat.setSnapPoints(snap_points)

  mat.interactable = false
end

-- UI
function toggleOptionsLayout(player)
  toggleVisibility(player, "options_layout")
  toggleVisibility(player, "menu_layout")
end

-- UI
function toggleImportLayout(player)
  toggleVisibility(player, "import_layout")
  toggleVisibility(player, "menu_layout")
end

function toggleMoreLayout(player)
  toggleVisibility(player, "import_more_layout")
  toggleVisibility(player, "import_less_layout")
end

playmats = {
    Red    = "35894d",
    Blue   = "f0607e",
    Green  = "53ddd0",
    Purple = "a251c2",
}

bags = {
    firstD6    = "5ddb44",
    secondD6   = "457b02",
    firstD12   = "f27d35",
    purpleD20  = "9231d7",
}

lifecounters = {
    redLarge    = "e6fe20",
    redSmall    = "0636e1",
    blueLarge   = "aea0a8",
    blueSmall   = "5ed0f4",
    greenLarge  = "a76cf3",
    greenSmall  = "e40c6b",
    purpleLarge = "a1c313",
    purpleSmall = "e07711",
}

playerhandzones = {
    Red    = "9e87d8",
    Blue   = "32941e",
    Green  = "2c30da",
    Purple = "c6b5a0"
}

playerfields = {
    Red    = "1236a0",
    Blue   = "e5fb87",
    Green  = "936992",
    Purple = "5fd0e9"
}

playermemoryzones = {
    Red    = "70b7c0",
    Blue   = "db3661",
    Green  = "936992",
    Purple = "5fd0e9"
}


function isFourPlayerMode()
    local redMat = getObjectFromGUID(playmats.Red)
    if not redMat then return true end
    local posX = redMat.getPosition().x
    return posX < -10
end

function isStillSwitching()
  local redMat = getObjectFromGUID(playmats.Red)
  if not redMat then return true end
  return redMat.isSmoothMoving()
end

function togglePlayerCount()

    if isStillSwitching() then
      print ("Wait for switching to finish first!")
      return
    end


    local moveDistance = -20
    local hideDistance = -200
    shouldLock = false

    if isFourPlayerMode() then
      moveDistance = 20
      hideDistance = 200
      shouldLock = true
    end

    print("[INFO] Switching between 2p/4p mode")

    moveObjectX(playmats.Red,   moveDistance)
    moveObjectX(playmats.Blue,  moveDistance)

    moveObjectX(lifecounters.redLarge,   moveDistance)
    moveObjectX(lifecounters.redSmall,   moveDistance)
    moveObjectX(lifecounters.blueLarge,  moveDistance)
    moveObjectX(lifecounters.blueSmall,  moveDistance)

    moveObjectX(playerhandzones.Red,  moveDistance)
    moveObjectX(playerhandzones.Blue, moveDistance)
    moveObjectX(playerfields.Red,  moveDistance)
    moveObjectX(playerfields.Blue, moveDistance)
    moveObjectX(playermemoryzones.Red,  moveDistance)
    moveObjectX(playermemoryzones.Blue, moveDistance)

    for _, bagGUID in pairs(bags) do
        moveObjectX(bagGUID, moveDistance)
    end

    moveObjectX(playmats.Green, hideDistance)
    moveObjectX(playmats.Purple, hideDistance)


    setObjectLock(lifecounters.greenLarge, shouldLock)
    setObjectLock(lifecounters.greenSmall, shouldLock)
    setObjectLock(lifecounters.purpleLarge, shouldLock)
    setObjectLock(lifecounters.purpleSmall, shouldLock)


    moveObjectX(lifecounters.greenLarge, hideDistance)
    moveObjectX(lifecounters.greenSmall, hideDistance)
    moveObjectX(lifecounters.purpleLarge, hideDistance)
    moveObjectX(lifecounters.purpleSmall, hideDistance)

    moveObjectX(playerhandzones.Green, hideDistance)
    moveObjectX(playerhandzones.Purple, hideDistance)
    moveObjectX(playerfields.Green, hideDistance)
    moveObjectX(playerfields.Purple, hideDistance)
    moveObjectX(playermemoryzones.Green, hideDistance)
    moveObjectX(playermemoryzones.Purple, hideDistance)
end

function moveObjectX(guid, deltaX)
    local obj = getObjectFromGUID(guid)
    if not obj then return end

    local pos = obj.getPosition()
    pos.x = pos.x + deltaX
    obj.setPositionSmooth(pos)
end

function moveObjectToX(guid, targetX)
    local obj = getObjectFromGUID(guid)
    if not obj then return end

    local pos = obj.getPosition()
    pos.x = targetX
    obj.setPositionSmooth(pos)
end

function setObjectLock(guid, locked)
  local obj = getObjectFromGUID(guid)
  obj.setLock(locked)
end

function toggleVisibility(player, id)
  visibility = Global.UI.getAttribute(id, "visibility")
  visible = visibility:find(player.color) ~= nil
  if visible then
    Global.UI.setAttribute(id, "visibility", visibility:gsub("|" .. player.color, ""))
  else
    Global.UI.setAttribute(id, "visibility", visibility .. "|" .. player.color)
  end
end

function setSleeve(player, value)
  ui_sleeve_state[player.color] = value
end

function setMaterialDeckSleeve(player, value)
  ui_material_deck_sleeve_state[player.color] = value
end

function setDecklist(player, value)
  ui_decklist_state[player.color] = value
end

-- Decks/Cards
function getSleeves(player)
  sleeve = ui_sleeve_state[player.color]
  if sleeve == nil or sleeve == "" then
    sleeve = card_back
  end
  return sleeve
end

-- Decks/Cards
function getMaterialDeckSleeves(player)
  sleeve = ui_material_deck_sleeve_state[player.color]
  if sleeve == nil or sleeve == "" then
    sleeve = getSleeves(player)
  end
  return sleeve
end

function getDeckBag(name, deck, player)
  local colorRGB = Color.fromString(player.color)
  return {
    Name = "Infinite_Bag",
    Transform = {
      scaleX = 1,
      scaleY = 1,
      scaleZ = 1,
      rotX = 0,
      rotY = 0,
      rotZ = 0
    },
    ColorDiffuse = {
      r = colorRGB.r,
      g = colorRGB.g,
      b = colorRGB.b
    },
    Nickname = name,
    ContainedObjects = {deck}
  }
end

global_offset = 0

function getCustomCard(image, sleeve)
  return {
    FaceURL = image,
    BackURL = sleeve,
    NumWidth = 1,
    NumHeight = 1,
    BackIsHidden = true,
    UniqueBack = false,
    Type = 0
  }
end

function getCard(custom_card, name, index)
  card_index = index + 100
  return {
    Name = "CardCustom",
    Transform = {
      scaleX = card_scale,
      scaleY = 1,
      scaleZ = card_scale
    },
    Nickname = name,
    CardID = card_index * 100,
    CustomDeck = {
      [card_index] = custom_card
    }
  }
end

-- Simple trimming of leading/trailing spaces
local function trimSpaces(str)
    if str == nil then
      return ""
    end
    return str:gsub("^%s+", ""):gsub("%s+$", "")
end

local function randomGUID()
    local chars = '0123456789abcdef'
    local res = {}
    for i=1,6 do
        local rand = math.random(#chars)
        res[#res+1] = chars:sub(rand, rand)
    end
    return table.concat(res)
end

function spawnDeck(name, cards, player, as_bag)
    local playmat = getObjectFromGUID(playmats[player.color])
    local rotation = playmat.getRotation()
    local position = playmat.positionToWorld(deck_position[name])
    local bounds   = playmat.getBounds()

    local deck = getDeck(name, cards, player)
    if as_bag or name=="references" then
        deck = getDeckBag(name, deck, player)
    end

    deck.Transform = deck.Transform or {}
    deck.Transform.posX = position.x
    deck.Transform.posY = playmat.getPosition().y + bounds.size.y + bounds.offset.y + 1
    deck.Transform.posZ = position.z
    deck.Transform.rotY = rotation.y

    return spawnObjectData({data = deck})
end

function getDeck(name, cards, player)
    global_offset = (global_offset % 30) + 1

    local sleeve = getSleeves(player)
    if name == "material" then
      sleeve = getMaterialDeckSleeves(player)
    end


    local deckOffset = global_offset * 1000

    local deck_ids       = {}
    local custom_deck    = {}
    local contained_objs = {}

    local idx = 1
    for _, card in ipairs(cards) do
        local cardstomake = (card.quantity == 0) and 1 or card.quantity

        for i = 1, cardstomake do
            local orientation = (card.orientation or ""):lower()
            local frontSide, backSide = nil, nil
            local hasOrientations = (type(card.orientations) == "table" and #card.orientations > 0)
            local isMultiState = false

            if hasOrientations then
                isMultiState = true
                local oppositeNeeded = (orientation == "front") and "back"
                    or (orientation == "back") and "front"
                    or nil

                if oppositeNeeded then
                    for _, alt in ipairs(card.orientations) do
                        if type(alt.orientation) == "string"
                            and alt.orientation:lower() == oppositeNeeded then
                            backSide = alt
                            break
                        end
                    end
                end
            end

            if orientation == "front" and backSide then
                frontSide = card
            elseif orientation == "back" and backSide then
                -- the user put the back side in their deck so we'll just flip it for them
                frontSide = backSide
                backSide  = card
            end

            if isMultiState then
                local frontKey    = (deckOffset + idx)
                local backKey     = frontKey + 1
                local frontBackKey= backKey + 1
                local frontID     = frontKey * 100
                local backID      = backKey * 100
                local frontBackID = frontBackKey * 100

                table.insert(deck_ids, frontID)

                local frontURL = frontSide.image or card_back
                local backURL  = backSide.image  or card_back

                custom_deck[tostring(frontKey)] = {
                    FaceURL      = frontURL,
                    BackURL      = sleeve,
                    NumWidth     = 1,
                    NumHeight    = 1,
                    BackIsHidden = true,
                    HideWhenFaceDown = true,
                    UniqueBack   = false,
                    Type         = 0
                }
                custom_deck[tostring(backKey)] = {
                    FaceURL      = backURL,
                    BackURL      = sleeve,
                    NumWidth     = 1,
                    NumHeight    = 1,
                    BackIsHidden = true,
                    HideWhenFaceDown = true,
                    UniqueBack   = true,
                    Type         = 0
                }
                custom_deck[tostring(frontBackKey)] = {
                    FaceURL      = frontURL,
                    BackURL      = backURL,
                    NumWidth     = 1,
                    NumHeight    = 1,
                    BackIsHidden = false,
                    HideWhenFaceDown = false,
                    UniqueBack   = true,
                    Type         = 0
                }

                table.insert(contained_objs, {
                    GUID = randomGUID(),
                    Name = "CardCustom",
                    Transform = { scaleX = card_scale, scaleY = 1, scaleZ = card_scale },
                    Nickname = frontSide.name or "(NoName)",
                    CardID   = frontID,
                    HideWhenFaceDown = true,
                    CustomDeck = {
                        [tostring(frontKey)] = custom_deck[tostring(frontKey)]
                    },
                    States = {
                        ["2"] = {
                            GUID = randomGUID(),
                            Name = "CardCustom",
                            Transform = { scaleX = card_scale, scaleY = 1, scaleZ = card_scale },
                            Nickname = backSide.name or "(NoName)",
                            CardID   = backID,
                            HideWhenFaceDown = true,
                            CustomDeck = {
                                [tostring(backKey)] = custom_deck[tostring(backKey)]
                            }
                        },
                        ["3"] = {
                            GUID = randomGUID(),
                            Name = "CardCustom",
                            Transform = { scaleX = card_scale, scaleY = 1, scaleZ = card_scale },
                            Nickname = frontSide.name .. " / " .. backSide.name or "(NoName)",
                            CardID   = frontBackID,
                            HideWhenFaceDown = false,
                            CustomDeck = {
                                [tostring(frontBackKey)] = custom_deck[tostring(frontBackKey)]
                            }
                        }
                    }
                })
                idx = idx + 3
            else
                local singleKey = deckOffset + idx
                local singleID  = singleKey * 100

                table.insert(deck_ids, singleID)

                local faceUrl = card.image or card_back

                custom_deck[tostring(singleKey)] = {
                    FaceURL      = faceUrl,
                    BackURL      = sleeve,
                    NumWidth     = 1,
                    NumHeight    = 1,
                    BackIsHidden = true,
                    HideWhenFaceDown = true,
                    UniqueBack   = false,
                    Type         = 0
                }

                table.insert(contained_objs, {
                    GUID = randomGUID(),
                    Name = "CardCustom",
                    Transform = { scaleX = card_scale, scaleY = 1, scaleZ = card_scale },
                    Nickname = card.name,
                    CardID   = singleID,
                    HideWhenFaceDown = true,
                    CustomDeck = {
                        [tostring(singleKey)] = custom_deck[tostring(singleKey)]
                    }
                })
                idx = idx + 1
            end
        end
    end

    if #contained_objs == 1 then
        contained_objs[1].Transform.rotZ = 180
        return contained_objs[1]
    else
        return {
            GUID = randomGUID(),
            Name = "Deck",
            Transform = {
                rotX = 360, rotY = 180, rotZ = 180,
                scaleX = card_scale, scaleY = 1, scaleZ = card_scale
            },
            Nickname = name,
            DeckIDs = deck_ids,
            CustomDeck = custom_deck,
            ContainedObjects = contained_objs
        }
    end
end

function importDeck(player, value, index)
    local deck_text = ui_decklist_state[player.color]
    deck_text = trimSpaces(deck_text)

    if deck_text == "" then
        broadcastToColor("No Decklist URL provided!", player.color, {255,0,0})
        return
    end

    if deck_text:match("^https?://") then
        importDeckFromURL(deck_text, player, value, index)
        return
    end

    if deck_text:match("^{") then
      local json = JSON.decode(deck_text)
      if json then
          if json.error == nil then
              SpawnDeckFromJson(json, player, value, index)
              return
          end
      end
    end

    broadcastToColor("Invalid deck input! Provide a valid JSON decklist or a URL.", player.color, {255,0,0})
end

function importDeckFromURL(deck_url, player, value, index)

  if deck_url ~= nil and deck_url:len() > 0 then
    if deck_url:sub(1, 5) ~= "https" then
      deck_url = "https://" .. deck_url
    end
    -- Silvie
    if deck_url:find("silvie.org") ~= nil then
        if deck_url:find("format=json") == nil then
            if deck_url:find("?") == nil then
              deck_url = deck_url .. "?format=json"
            else
              deck_url = deck_url .. "&format=json"
            end
        end
    -- ShoutAtYourDecks
    elseif deck_url:find("shoutatyourdecks.com") ~= nil then
      deck_url = deck_url:gsub("/decks/", "/api/")
    else
      broadcastToColor("Invalid Decklist URL!", player.color, {255,0,0})
      return
    end

    WebRequest.get(deck_url, function(req)
      if req.is_error then
        log(request.error)
      else
        json = JSON.decode(req.text)
        if json.error ~= nil then
          log(json.error)
          if json.error == "silvie/bad-request" then
            broadcastToColor("Invalid Silvie.org Decklist!", player.color, {255,0,0})
          else
            broadcastToColor("Unknown Error :(", player.color, {255,0,0})
          end
        else
          -- Generate Cards
          for deck, cards in pairs(json.cards) do
            if #cards > 0 then
              spawnDeck(deck, cards, player, index=="import_deck_bag")
            end
          end
        end
      end
    end)
  end
end

function SpawnDeckFromJson(json, player, value, index)
  for deck, cards in pairs(json.cards) do
    if #cards > 0 then
      spawnDeck(deck, cards, player, index=="import_deck_bag")
    end
  end
end


cameraPositions2P = {
    Red    = { position = Vector(0, -2.5, -1), rotation = {x = 45, y = 0, z = 0} },
    Blue   = { position = Vector(0, -2.5, 1), rotation = {x = 45, y = 180, z = 0} },
}

cameraPositions4P = {
    Red    = { position = Vector(-20, -2.5, -1), rotation = {x = 45, y = 0, z = 0} },
    Blue   = { position = Vector(-20, -2.5, 1), rotation = {x = 45, y = 180, z = 0} },
    Green  = { position = Vector(20, -2.5, -1), rotation = {x = 45, y = 0, z = 0} },
    Purple = { position = Vector(20, -2.5, 1), rotation = {x = 45, y = 180, z = 0} }
}


function resetCamera(player_color)

    cameraPositions = cameraPositions2P
    if isFourPlayerMode() then
      cameraPositions = cameraPositions4P
    end

    local camData = cameraPositions[player_color]
    if camData then
        local player = nil
        for _, p in pairs(Player.getPlayers()) do
            if p.color == player_color then
                player = p
                break
            end
        end
        if not player then
            return
        end

        player.lookAt({
            position = camData.position,
            pitch = camData.rotation.x,
            yaw = camData.rotation.y,
            roll = camData.rotation.z
        })
    end
end

function waitToSwitchState(obj, newState)
    Wait.condition(
        function()
            if not obj.isDestroyed() then
                obj.setState(newState)
            end
        end,
        function()
            return not obj.isSmoothMoving()
        end
    )
end


function banishOneMemoryCard(player, value, index)

  if memoryZone == nil then log("Memory Zone is nil.") return end

  local memoryCards = 0
  local memoryCheck = 0

  if (memoryZone.getObjects()) != nil then
    memoryCards = #memoryZone.getObjects()-1
    randomCard = math.random(memoryCards)

    for _,item in ipairs(memoryZone.getObjects()) do
      if item.tag == "Card" then
        memoryCheck = memoryCheck + 1
        if memoryCheck == randomCard then
          rotation = self.getRotation()
          item.setPositionSmooth(banishmentZone.getPosition())
          item.setRotationSmooth({rotation.x,zones.banishment.rot,rotation.z})
        end
      end
    end
  end
end

function revealRandomMemoryCard(player, value, index)

  if memoryZone == nil then log("Memory Zone is nil.") return end

  local memoryCards = 0
  local memoryCheck = 0

  if (memoryZone.getObjects()) != nil then
    memoryCards = #memoryZone.getObjects()-1
    randomCard = math.random(memoryCards)

    for _,item in ipairs(memoryZone.getObjects()) do
      if item.tag == "Card" then
        memoryCheck = memoryCheck + 1
        if memoryCheck == randomCard then
          item.flip()
        end
      end
    end
  end
end

function recollectMemory(player, value, index)

  if memoryZone == nil then log("Memory Zone is nil.") return end

  if (memoryZone.getObjects()) != nil then
    for _,item in ipairs(memoryZone.getObjects()) do
      if item.tag == "Card" then
        item.deal(1,myPlayer.color)
      end
    end
  end

end

function onObjectLeaveZone(zone, obj)
    if obj.tag == "Card" then
        if obj.getStateId() == 3 then
          if zone.getName() == "Field" then
              if not obj.isDestroyed() then
                waitToSwitchState(obj, 1)
              end
          end
        end
    end
end

function onObjectEnterZone(zone, obj)
    if obj.tag == "Card" and obj.getStateId() ~= 3 then
        if zone.getName() == "Field" then
            local rotation = obj.getRotation()
              if math.abs(rotation.z) < 90 then -- Face-up condition
                  waitToSwitchState(obj, 3)
              end
            return
        end
    end
end

function onPlayerChangeColor(player_color)
    Wait.time(function()
        resetCamera(player_color)
    end, 0.5) -- Delay allows default camera animation to complete
end

function onScriptingButtonUp(index, player_color)
    if index==10 then -- Numpad 0 (as assigned in TTS settings)
        resetCamera(player_color)
    end
end
XmlUI:
<!--
Xml UI. See documentation:
https://api.tabletopsimulator.com/ui/introUI/
-->

<Panel visibility="Red|Blue|Green|Purple|Brown">
  <HorizontalLayout
    id="menu_layout"
    childAlignment="MiddleRight"
    childForceExpandWidth="false"
    rectAlignment="LowerRight"
    height="40"
    padding="0 80 0 10"
    visibility="Black|Red|Blue|Green|Purple|Brown"
  >
    <Button
      colors="#00FF00|#88FF88|#008800|#DDFFDD"
      fontStyle="Bold"
      minHeight="33"
      minWidth="70"
      onClick="toggleOptionsLayout"
    >Options⬇⬇⬇⬇</Button>
    <Button
      colors="#00FF00|#88FF88|#008800|#DDFFDD"
      fontStyle="Bold"
      minHeight="33"
      minWidth="70"
      onClick="toggleImportLayout"
    >Import Deck⬇⬇⬇⬇</Button>
  </HorizontalLayout>
  <VerticalLayout
    id="options_layout"
    childAlignment="LowerRight"
    childForceExpandHeight="false"
    rectAlignment="LowerRight"
    width="170"
    padding="0 80 0 10"
    visibility="Black"
  >
    <Button
      colors="#FF0000|#FF8888|#880000|#FFDDDD"
      fontStyle="Bold"
      preferredHeight="33"
      minWidth="33"
      onClick="toggleOptionsLayout"
    >✖⬇⬇⬇⬇</Button>
    <Button
      colors="#00FF00|#88FF88|#008800|#DDFFDD"
      fontStyle="Bold"
      preferredHeight="33"
      minWidth="70"
      onClick="togglePlayerCount"
    >Toggle 2P / 4P⬇⬇⬇⬇</Button>
    <Button
      colors="#00FF00|#88FF88|#008800|#DDFFDD"
      fontStyle="Bold"
      preferredHeight="33"
      minWidth="70"
      onClick="banishOneMemoryCard"
    >Banish 1 Random Memory⬇⬇⬇⬇</Button>
    <Button
      colors="#00FF00|#88FF88|#008800|#DDFFDD"
      fontStyle="Bold"
      preferredHeight="33"
      minWidth="70"
      onClick="revealRandomMemoryCard"
    >Reveal 1 Random Memory⬇⬇⬇⬇</Button>
    <Button
      colors="#00FF00|#88FF88|#008800|#DDFFDD"
      fontStyle="Bold"
      preferredHeight="33"
      minWidth="70"
      onClick="recollectMemory"
    >Recollect⬇⬇⬇⬇</Button>
  </VerticalLayout>
  <VerticalLayout
      id="import_layout"
      padding="0 80 0 10"
      visibility="Black"
      height="80"
      rectAlignment="LowerRight"
      childForceExpandHeight="false"
  >
    <HorizontalLayout
      id="import_upper_layout"
      childAlignment="MiddleRight"
      childForceExpandWidth="false"
      rectAlignment="LowerRight"
      height="40"
    >
      <HorizontalLayout
        id="import_more_layout"
        childAlignment="MiddleRight"
        childForceExpandWidth="false"
        rectAlignment="LowerRight"
        height="40"
        visibility="Black"
      >
        <Button
          colors="#00FFFF|#88FFFF|#008888|#DDFFFF"
          minHeight="33"
          minWidth="66"
          fontStyle="Bold"
          onClick="toggleMoreLayout"
        >Less⬇⬇⬇⬇</Button>
        <InputField
          id="material_deck_sleeve_input"
          minWidth="300"
          onEndEdit="setMaterialDeckSleeve"
          placeholder="Material Deck Sleeve URL (Optional)"
        ></InputField>
        <Button
          id="import_deck_bag"
          colors="#00FF00|#88FF88|#008800|#DDFFDD"
          fontStyle="Bold"
          minWidth="80"
          minHeight="33"
          onClick="importDeck"
        >Import as ∞ Bag⬇⬇⬇⬇</Button>
      </HorizontalLayout>
      <Button
        colors="#FF0000|#FF8888|#880000|#FFDDDD"
        minHeight="33"
        minWidth="33"
        onClick="toggleImportLayout"
      >✖⬇⬇⬇⬇</Button>
    </HorizontalLayout>
    <HorizontalLayout
      id="import_basic_layout"
      childAlignment="MiddleRight"
      childForceExpandWidth="false"
      rectAlignment="LowerRight"
      height="40"
      maxHeight="40"
    >
    <HorizontalLayout
      id="import_less_layout"
      childAlignment="MiddleRight"
      childForceExpandWidth="false"
      rectAlignment="LowerRight"
      height="40"
      visibility="Black|Red|Blue|Green|Purple|Brown"
    >
        <Button
          colors="#00FFFF|#88FFFF|#008888|#DDFFFF"
          minHeight="33"
          minWidth="66"
          fontStyle="Bold"
          onClick="toggleMoreLayout"
        >More⬇⬇⬇⬇</Button>
      </HorizontalLayout>
      <InputField
        id="sleeve_input"
        minWidth="250"
        preferredWidth="250"
        resizeTextForBestFit="false"
        onEndEdit="setSleeve"
        placeholder="Sleeve URL (Optional)"
      ></InputField>
      <InputField
        id="decklist_input"
        minWidth="250"
        preferredWidth="250"
        resizeTextForBestFit="false"
        onEndEdit="setDecklist"
        placeholder="Silvie/Shout Decklist URL or JSON"
      ></InputField>
      <Button
        id="import_deck"
        colors="#00FF00|#88FF88|#008800|#DDFFDD"
        fontStyle="Bold"
        minHeight="33"
        minWidth="66"
        onClick="importDeck"
      >Import⬇⬇⬇⬇</Button>
    </HorizontalLayout>
  </VerticalLayout>
</Panel>

ContainedObjects.Name: Die_6_Rounded
ContainedObjects.LuaScript:
local markerColors = {
    Imbued      = {r=0.2, g=0.7, b=0.2},
    Fracturized = {r=0.2, g=0.2, b=0.8},
    Distant     = {r=0.8, g=0.8, b=0.2},
    Quest     = {r=0.8, g=0.4, b=0.9},
    Fostered    = {r=0.8, g=0.2, b=0.4},
    Spellshroud = {r=0.6, g=0.1, b=0.6},
    Taunt       = {r=0.7, g=0.4, b=0.1},
    Stealth     = {r=0.7, g=0.7, b=0.7},
    Buff        = {r=0.0, g=0.0, b=0.0},
    Wither      = {r=0.0, g=0.8, b=0.8},
    Durability  = {r=0.3, g=0.3, b=0.3}
}

local markerTypes = {
    "Imbued",
    "Fracturized",
    "Distant",
    "Quest",
    "Fostered",
    "Spellshroud",
    "Taunt",
    "Stealth",
    "Buff",
    "Wither",
    "Durability"
}

function onLoad()
    -- For each marker type, add a top-level context menu item
    for _, markerName in ipairs(markerTypes) do
        self.addContextMenuItem("Set to " .. markerName, function(playerColor)
            setMarker(markerName)
        end)
    end
end

function setMarker(markerName)
    local color = markerColors[markerName] or {r=1, g=1, b=1}
    self.setColorTint(color)
    self.setName(markerName .. " Counter")
end
